Answer: Place value of tenths → First digit after decimal point
Place value of hundredths → Second digit after decimal point
Addition of decimals → Align decimal points
Subtraction of decimals → Align decimal points

Set B: Ignore decimal first then place later
Answer: Multiplying decimals → Ignore decimal first then place later
Converting fraction to decimal → Divide numerator by denominator
Like decimals → Same number of decimal places

Set B: The one with smaller place value digit
Answer: Smallest decimal number → The one with smaller place value digit
